name: property-intelligence
description: Property Intelligence Platform — Vite frontend + Cloudflare Workers/D1/R2 backend

scripts.predeploy: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test
scripts.deploy: npm run predeploy && npm run build && wrangler deploy --env production
scripts.deploy:staging: npm run predeploy && npm run build && wrangler deploy --env staging
scripts.deploy:dev: npm run build && wrangler deploy --env development
